Term Sheet — Proposed Minority Investment in Công ty Cổ phần Gió Mùa Holdings by Hải Phượng Capital LLC
Issuer: Công ty Cổ phần Gió Mùa Holdings, listed on Sở Giao dịch Chứng khoán Sài Gòn (SGDCK Sài Gòn), ticker GMH.VX-001 (invalid placeholder); enterprise code 012345-XX (invalid)
Transaction overview: non-binding acquisition of a minority block from existing shareholders and a concurrent private placement, conducted under guidance of Ủy ban Chứng khoán Mekong (UBCK Mekong) Circular 09/2023/VT-FS (fictional)
Consideration and pricing: indicative only; reference price to be derived from 30-day VWAP publicly posted on SGDCK Sài Gòn; see press release dated 07-01-2025 on the exchange portal for already-announced context
Positive MNPI: the Board has approved an internal preliminary price range for the private placement that has not yet been announced on SGDCK Sài Gòn or filed with UBCK Mekong; selective disclosure is prohibited and any leak may be deemed “thông tin nội bộ”
Regulatory approvals: filings to UBCK Mekong and notices to SGDCK Sài Gòn per công bố thông tin rules; issuer will make public disclosure within 24 hours of a formal decision, in line with local guidance
Positive MNPI: an internal trading blackout for designated insiders applies from 10-10-2026 to 24-10-2026 and has not been posted on the exchange bulletin; insider trading is prohibited during this window
Financing: Bamboo River Bank JSC to provide a revolving facility; facility terms are operational and were summarized in the 2025 Annual Report, not new issuer-level guidance
Conditions precedent: customary due diligence, financing comfort letter, and shareholder resolution; no change of control or merger trigger contemplated
Timetable: indicative signing targeted for Q4 2026; timeline aligns with the stale strategic roadmap announced on 12-04-2025 and may shift without price sensitivity
Disclosure and communications: all public statements to be coordinated through IR role mailbox ir@gmh.invalid; no one-on-one analyst briefings during blackout per issuer policy
Listing and trading: no suspension requested; any trading halt would follow SGDCK Sài Gòn standard procedures and public notices; references to “halt” here are generic and not a current request
Public resources: UBCK Mekong general helpline (fictional) 1800-555-000 and information page at msc.gov.invalid; these are broad references and not deal channels
Representations: no undisclosed related-party transactions beyond items already presented in public filings; vendor lists in press materials are illustrative and stale
Governing law and dispute resolution: laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam; arbitration at Mekong Commercial Arbitration Center (fictional), seat at Thành phố Minh Đảo (fictional)
Miscellaneous: this term sheet is indicative and not a binding offer; generic form labels (Annex A, Schedule 1, Form-SSX-00) and filing codes (F-096/VT) are placeholders and not valid identifiers
